name: Show Document Chunks
title: Show Document Chunks
description: Show all chunks belonging to the selected document.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('documents', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node has_chunk
    LIMIT 50
    RETURN e

name: Show Extracted Classes
title: Show Extracted Classes
description: Show all ontology classes extracted from the selected document.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('documents', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 INBOUND node extracted_from
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Class Properties
title: Show Class Properties
description: Show all properties of the selected ontology class.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_classes', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node has_property
    LIMIT 50
    RETURN e

name: Show Class Hierarchy
title: Show Class Hierarchy
description: Show the subclass hierarchy of the selected class.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_classes', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..5 ANY node subclass_of
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Source Document
title: Show Source Document
description: Trace the selected class back to its source document.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_classes', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node extracted_from
    LIMIT 10
    RETURN e

name: Show Extraction Run
title: Show Extraction Run
description: Show which extraction run produced the selected ontology.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_registry', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node produced_by
    LIMIT 10
    RETURN e

name: Full Pipeline View
title: Full Pipeline View
description: Expand all connections 1-2 hops from the selected node.
queryText:
WITH documents, chunks, ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_registry, extraction_runs, has_chunk, extracted_from, has_property, subclass_of, produced_by
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..2 ANY node GRAPH 'aoe_process'
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e
